title: senecio oleraceus
intro: Senecio oleraceus, also known as Jacob's Ladder or Bitter Weed, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, primarily due to its bitter compounds, which exhibit hepatoprotective, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio oleraceus include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Senecio oleraceus are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or as an extract, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and skin problems.
